case_title: 199 NEW MONTGOMERY OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. QIN XIANG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,286.37 FILED BY 199 NEW MONTGOMERY OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT XIANG, QIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 5/9/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO 199 NEW MONTGOMERY OWNER'S ASSOCIATION-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(DEFENDANT)**DENIED**
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT XIANG, QIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF 199 NEW MONTGOMERY OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFAR, MANAGER. DEFENDANT QIN XIANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THE DEFENDANT PAID OFF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
